---
description: "Pick **one** of the two workflows below depending on the deliverable type. Use **Documentation workflow** for docs under `docs/`, **Code workflow** fo"
---

Follow the workflow defined in `.claude/commands/do-work.md` in this
repository. Read that file and execute its steps exactly — it is the
canonical definition of the /do-work command; this prompt is a thin adapter
so the command stays single-sourced. Treat any text after the prompt
invocation as the command's arguments ($ARGUMENTS).
